title: Missing the Last Train
content: After having dinner with some old friends downtown, Ryan checked the time and realized it was much later than he expected. He quickly walked to the train station, hoping to catch the last train home. When he arrived, however, the platform was empty. The final train had left only two minutes earlier. Ryan sighed and sat on a bench while thinking about his options. Taxis were expensive at that hour, and the buses had already stopped running. Eventually, he called a friend who lived nearby and asked if he could stay the night. Although the situation was frustrating, Ryan ended up enjoying a long late-night conversation and a good breakfast the next morning.
